omniProcessElements.name: IP_SaveAssessmentResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Competency_SaveAssessmentResponse", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "omniProcessId" : "%omniProcessId%", "omniscriptId" : "%omniscriptId%", "Step1" : "%Step1%", "AssessmentEnvelopeItemId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_RunningContext" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP", "AssessmentName" : "1.5 Certification of Competency (HM-PAPS-Tele-Hospitalist NP-PA)" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

childElements.name: Care_Continuity_Communication_Across_Inpatient_and_Outpatient_Settings
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Facilitates and communicates with patient, family and staff to promote continuity of care across the inpatient and outpatient continuum of care.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Diagnosis_of_Health_Conditions_Using_Advanced_Clinical_Decision_Making
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Diagnose health and medical conditions by reviewing all available health information, and applying advanced clinical decision making processes.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Do_you_have_or_are_you_able_to_obtain_procedure_case_logs_showing_thatQT
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Do you have or are you able to obtain procedure / case logs showing that you have performed these procedures within the last 2 years?\n
    \n
  • Procedure / Case logs are records that track the number of patients treated and/or procedures performed by a clinician, often used to document competency and meet training requirements. A copy of these logs can be requested from the hospital/employer's medical staff office, quality assurance department, Health Information Management department, or billing office. Typically, these records are only released to the clinician themselves.
    • \n
", "text" : "Do you have or are you able to obtain procedure / case logs showing that you have performed these procedures within the last 2 years?

  • Procedure / Case logs are records that track the number of patients treated and/or procedures performed by a clinician, often used to document competency and meet training requirements. A copy of these logs can be requested from the hospital/employer's medical staff office, quality assurance department, Health Information Management department, or billing office. Typically, these records are only released to the clinician themselves.

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: Do_you_have_or_are_you_able_to_obtain_procedure_Response
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Response", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Familiar with protocols as it pertains to “use of restraints”", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: H_P_Progress_Notes_Transfers_and_Discharge_Summaries
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Documents in the medical record a complete history and physical examination for acute and complex chronically ill patients upon initial admission/consultation and key components of patient's progress via progress notes as medically necessary, transfer, and discharge summary.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Health_Problem_Management_and_Care_Coordination_in_Post_Acute_Setting
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Manage health problems by developing an individualized plan of care, prescribing medications or treatments, obtaining consultations and referrals, and coordinating health care services in collaboration with the post acute setting.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Knowledge and awareness of high-tech HIPAA compliance policies (electronic transmission by phone or text of X-ray and EKGs/Facebook and social media).", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: History_Physical_Exam_and_Diagnostic_Interpretation
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Evaluate an individual’s health by taking a history, performing a physical examination and ordering and interpreting results from appropriate laboratory and diagnostic tests/procedures.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Initial_v3
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Initial", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Post_Acute_Care_Role_Core_Expectations_Acknowledgment
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Core Expectations: Functions within the acute care hospital and/or sub-acute/post-acute setting, working in collaboration with, and being an integral member of the Post Acute Services team. Primary role involves the care of acute and complex chronically ill patients 16 years of age and older by managing the day to day patient care from admission to discharge.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Proficiency_in_Basic_Computer_Skills
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Proficient in basic computer skills required for completing electronic medical records", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Assessment_for_Acute_and_Complex_Chronically_Ill_Patients
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Assesses for risks associated with the care of the acute and complex chronically ill patient including: medication side effects, immobility, impaired nutrition, fluid and electrolyte imbalance, immunocompetence, invasive interventions and diagnostic procedures.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }
